subject: Absol, a white quadruped Pokemon with a curved blade-like horn, standing on rocky terrain under a dramatic sky
description: A white four-legged creature stands on rocky grey terrain, looking toward the viewer. A distinctive curved scythe-like horn protrudes from the side of its head. Its body is predominantly white with dark markings visible on its face and head. Behind it, a dramatic sky with dark storm clouds meets distant mountain peaks. The overall palette is cold — steel blue, white, and grey. The pose is alert and still, conveying watchfulness or foreboding.
foreground: white quadruped creature with curved horn on rocky ground
